title: Redesign hero section layout and image

requirements.text: Redesign the Hero section in frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx with a fresh layout. Replace the current side-by-side arrangement with a full-width, visually striking design: use a large background-style hero image with an overlay, center-aligned or asymmetric headline and subtext, updated CTA button placement, and retain the stat badges (24/7, 100%, Toledo) and DODD accreditation badge in the new layout. The new hero image (hero-redesign.dim_1440x900.png) should be rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated.

quotes: change hero section design and image

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section has a visually distinct layout different from the previous side-by-side columns design
New hero image (hero-redesign.dim_1440x900.png) is rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated
Headline 'Reliable care, rooted in community.' is prominently displayed
Both CTA buttons are visible and functional
Stat badges (24/7, 100%, Toledo) and the DODD accreditation badge are present in the updated layout
Design is responsive and looks good on mobile and desktop
Primary green (#2D7A5F) brand colors and typography remain consistent with the rest of the site

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Retain the headline text 'Reliable care, rooted in community.' and existing stat badges
Hero image must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated, not through the backend
nonGoals: Redesigning any section other than the Hero
Changing the site-wide color theme or typography
Modifying the Navbar, TrustBar, or any other component

required: Warm, professional community healthcare scene — a diverse group of caregivers and clients in a bright, welcoming indoor or outdoor setting with natural light and a sense of trust and warmth (hero-redesign.dim_1440x900.png)
